mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED' THEN total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_revenue, COUNT(*) AS total_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PICKUP_COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pickup_completed, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PAYMENT_PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS payment_pending, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS canceled, SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'EXPIRED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired FROM orders WHERE store_id = #{storeId}

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS order_date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED' THEN total_price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS daily_revenue, COUNT(*) AS daily_count FROM orders WHERE store_id = #{storeId} AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY order_date ASC
